name: worktree
description: Create an isolated git worktree under .claude/worktrees/ for reviewing an MR/PR or working on a branch. Resolves the source branch from an MR number, URL, or branch name, copies gitignored env files (.env, .envrc) from the main worktree, bootstraps with direnv/uv/bun/npm/pnpm, and switches the session into the new worktree.
